Error: cache entry not found for DescribeResource:{"resource_type":"pods","name":"ts-security-service","namespace":"train-ticket"}

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-security-service
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: ts-security-service
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: ts-security-service
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: ts-security-service
        image: ghcr.io/sregym/ts-security-service:latest
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        env:
        - name: SPRING_MAIN_ALLOW_CIRCULAR_REFERENCES
          value: 'true'
        - name: NODE_IP
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              fieldPath: status.hostIP
        envFrom:
        - secretRef:
            name: ts-security-mysql
        - configMapRef:
            name: nacos
        ports:
        - containerPort: 11188
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 300Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 2000Mi
        readinessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 11188
          initialDelaySeconds: 60
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-security-service
spec:
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 11188
  selector:
    app: ts-security-service
